name: sync registries: /compliance-add routes US Federal jurisdiction into us-government/, EU into european-union/ (per G-9.1)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://nist.gov/x --id nist-new --jurisdiction "US Federal" --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f "tree/us-government/nist-new.yaml" ] && echo ok 1>&2
